creator: aeuii@posteo.de
text:
Hello, could you commit the patch to update devel/dash.el.  devel/magit seems to be broken with the version 2.6.0_2 from the port tree and enters the debugger when trying to commit (c c):

    Debugger entered--Lisp error: (void-function -non-nil)

https://github.com/magit/magit/issues/2031 looks related.

Thank you!
